name: should create a query with an N+1 column
description: Test case for should create a query with an N+1 column
expected_query: with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2017,2018,2019,2020,2021,2022,2023]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years WHERE player.pos IN ('WR')), "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8" as materialized (select COALESCE(trg_pid) as pid, "nfl_plays"."year", SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as trg_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2017, 2018, 2019, 2020, 2021, 2022, 2023) group by "nfl_plays"."year", COALESCE(trg_pid) having SUM(CASE WHEN trg_pid IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) >= '55'), "tb554a1dcb34a23066da7f0a2eab29534" as materialized (select "pg"."pid", ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.trg_pid = pg.pid THEN CASE WHEN nfl_plays.first_down THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN nfl_plays.first_down THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0), 2) as recv_first_down_share_from_plays, "nfl_plays"."year" from "nfl_plays" inner join "player_gamelogs" as "pg" on "nfl_plays"."esbid" = "pg"."esbid" and "nfl_plays"."off" = "pg"."tm" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and ("trg_pid" is not null) and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2017, 2018, 2019, 2020, 2021, 2022, 2023) and "pg"."year" in (2017, 2018, 2019, 2020, 2021, 2022, 2023) group by "pg"."pid", "nfl_plays"."year"), "t1fd460cfe61d45c55db2181831d714e4" as materialized (select COALESCE(trg_pid) as pid, "nfl_plays"."year", SUM(CASE WHEN comp = true THEN recv_yds ELSE 0 END) as rec_yds_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2017, 2018, 2019, 2020, 2021, 2022, 2023) group by "nfl_plays"."year", COALESCE(trg_pid)), "t2405a9cf47dfbbb983319b35ff868c51" as materialized (select COALESCE(bc_pid) as pid, "nfl_plays"."year", SUM(rush_yds) as rush_yds_from_plays from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2017, 2018, 2019, 2020, 2021, 2022, 2023) group by "nfl_plays"."year", COALESCE(bc_pid)) select "t66d00c2fcac5ac2f95b5f893b24cd91c"."pid", player.fname, player.lname, "player_seasonlogs"."espn_overall_score" AS "espn_overall_score_0", "tb554a1dcb34a23066da7f0a2eab29534"."recv_first_down_share_from_plays" AS "recv_first_down_share_from_plays_0", "t66d00c2fcac5ac2f95b5f893b24cd91c"."points_per_game" AS "points_per_game_from_seasonlogs_0", "t2af9e074f581d4acd06bc6545ae3479b"."points_per_game" AS "points_per_game_from_seasonlogs_1", "t1fd460cfe61d45c55db2181831d714e4"."rec_yds_from_plays" AS "rec_yds_from_plays_0", "t2405a9cf47dfbbb983319b35ff868c51"."rush_yds_from_plays" AS "rush_yds_from_plays_0", "t66d00c2fcac5ac2f95b5f893b24cd91c"."year", "player"."pos" from "scoring_format_player_seasonlogs" as "t66d00c2fcac5ac2f95b5f893b24cd91c" inner join "player" on "player"."pid" = "t66d00c2fcac5ac2f95b5f893b24cd91c"."pid" inner join "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8" on "t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8"."pid" = "t66d00c2fcac5ac2f95b5f893b24cd91c"."pid" and t98531c6d5c2090f23cfc501ab69d3ed8.year = t66d00c2fcac5ac2f95b5f893b24cd91c.year inner join "player_seasonlogs" on "player_seasonlogs"."pid" = "t66d00c2fcac5ac2f95b5f893b24cd91c"."pid" and "player_seasonlogs"."year" = "t66d00c2fcac5ac2f95b5f893b24cd91c"."year" and "player_seasonlogs"."seas_type" = 'REG' left join "tb554a1dcb34a23066da7f0a2eab29534" on "tb554a1dcb34a23066da7f0a2eab29534"."pid" = "t66d00c2fcac5ac2f95b5f893b24cd91c"."pid" and tb554a1dcb34a23066da7f0a2eab29534.year = t66d00c2fcac5ac2f95b5f893b24cd91c.year and "tb554a1dcb34a23066da7f0a2eab29534"."year" in (2023, 2022, 2021, 2020, 2019, 2018, 2017) left join "scoring_format_player_seasonlogs" as "t2af9e074f581d4acd06bc6545ae3479b" on "t2af9e074f581d4acd06bc6545ae3479b"."pid" = "t66d00c2fcac5ac2f95b5f893b24cd91c"."pid" and t2af9e074f581d4acd06bc6545ae3479b.year = t66d00c2fcac5ac2f95b5f893b24cd91c.year + -3 and "t2af9e074f581d4acd06bc6545ae3479b"."scoring_format_id" = 'draftkings' left join "t1fd460cfe61d45c55db2181831d714e4" on "t1fd460cfe61d45c55db2181831d714e4"."pid" = "t66d00c2fcac5ac2f95b5f893b24cd91c"."pid" and t1fd460cfe61d45c55db2181831d714e4.year = t66d00c2fcac5ac2f95b5f893b24cd91c.year + 1 left join "t2405a9cf47dfbbb983319b35ff868c51" on "t2405a9cf47dfbbb983319b35ff868c51"."pid" = "t66d00c2fcac5ac2f95b5f893b24cd91c"."pid" and t2405a9cf47dfbbb983319b35ff868c51.year = t66d00c2fcac5ac2f95b5f893b24cd91c.year + 1 where "t66d00c2fcac5ac2f95b5f893b24cd91c"."scoring_format_id" = 'draftkings' and player.pos IN ('WR') and player_seasonlogs.espn_overall_score > '0' group by player.fname, player.lname, "player_seasonlogs"."espn_overall_score", "tb554a1dcb34a23066da7f0a2eab29534"."recv_first_down_share_from_plays", "t66d00c2fcac5ac2f95b5f893b24cd91c"."points_per_game", "t2af9e074f581d4acd06bc6545ae3479b"."points_per_game", "t1fd460cfe61d45c55db2181831d714e4"."rec_yds_from_plays", "t2405a9cf47dfbbb983319b35ff868c51"."rush_yds_from_plays", "t66d00c2fcac5ac2f95b5f893b24cd91c"."year", "t66d00c2fcac5ac2f95b5f893b24cd91c"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 6 DESC NULLS LAST, "t66d00c2fcac5ac2f95b5f893b24cd91c"."pid" asc limit 500
